# Compare before and after frames
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame

    print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']} children={n['children']}")

# Check ASCII differences

after_ascii = after.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nASCII diffs:")

    if b != a:
        print(f"  Row {i}:")

        print(f"    After:  {a}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

Goal model: Navigate the blue block through the maze to reach the bottom-right blue block (node 11).
Action model: Directional keys move the blue block through the maze, possibly jumping between positions.
Plan: Try DOWN to see if the block moves vertically, then map out the full path.
